title: Crows Can Remember Your Face For Years!

scenes.text: Crows have an amazing memory and can recognize human faces for years!
They remember individuals who have wronged them, but also those who feed them.
This ability helps them navigate complex social structures.
Crows aren’t just smart; they’re social engineers!
scenes.label: SOCIAL ENGINEERS

scenes.text: Hit follow for your daily dose of wow.

description: Crows can recognize human faces for years, a trait that aids their social interactions. Follow for daily facts!
